title: Minecraft but 100x better
description: This has a little bit  of everything, from herobrine to space exploration, even pocket dimensions!
body:
This is a fun modpack that started as something I set up for myself and my friends to play with, so it has alittle bit of everything in it.
Some of the main features you can expect to see:
Technology, like create and Applied Energistics 2, aswell as RFTools.
Dimension revamps; like incendium, bygone nether, and End's Phantasm.
Exploration; like Alex's caves, Aquamirae, and Villages & Pillages.
New Dimensions; like deeper and darker, Aether, and Dimensional Doors.
Terrian generation like; Tetonic, Biome's of plenty, and Terralith.
Mobs: Alex's mobs, Endermen Overhaul, and Mythic Mounts.
Travel: Backpacks, world and minimap, and even waystones.
Magic mods such as: Occultism and Blood magic
Some other things inclueded: Dungeons, Seasons, a bunch of weapons, difficult boss fights, and so much more.
Disclaimer: I do not own any of the mods in this pack nor did i make any of them
